Class Topic

java.lang.Object
graph.Topic
public class Topic extends Object
A named publish/subscribe channel in the computational graph. Topic uses concurrent sets so subscription and publication operations can be used safely by multiple agents and HTTP worker threads.

  • Method Details

    • subscribe

      public void subscribe(Agent agent)
      Registers an agent as a subscriber. Duplicate registration is ignored.
      Parameters:
      agent - subscriber to notify on publish

    • publish

      public void publish(Message msg)
      Publishes a message to all current subscribers and remembers it as the latest topic value for display purposes.
      Parameters:
      msg - message to deliver
